cases.input: Create an offline Google Slides MCP checklist that reads a template presentation, reads one page, gets a thumbnail, creates a draft deck, and batch-updates the new deck after confirmation.
Use Google Slides MCP to get a temporary thumbnail for slide object slide_title in presentation template_qbr_2026 and make sure the URL is not persisted.
Create a Google Slides deck called Board Review through workspace-mcp, but first produce the exact confirmation gate I must approve.
Batch update presentation draft_qbr_2026 with createSlide and insertText requests after either reading it first or creating it in the same plan.
Read a Slides file that was not created by the app; use the narrow read-only Slides scope and avoid Drive-wide permissions.
Use Drive-wide scope for Slides without explaining why presentations.readonly or drive.file cannot work.
Call get_page_thumbnail for presentations.batchUpdate because both touch slides.
Batch update a presentation immediately without asking for explicit approval.
Before using Slides MCP, verify that the local Workspace MCP setup docs and project MCP integration docs are reflected in the operation plan.
